newspaper: Unknown (likely Gazeta de Noticias based on previous analysis)
original_snippet_context: Discussion of taxes on 'xarque' (jerked beef) and its impact on different regions of Brazil, with a brief aside mentioning the Caixa de Conversão.
relevant_quote: ...a sombra do imposto actual, não vá propria Caixa de Conversão attenuar grandemente esse imposto...
justification: The snippet suggests the Caixa de Conversão would mitigate the negative impact of the tax, which aligns with the expansionist view of the Caixa as a tool to support economic activity.
